creator: erwin@schliske.de
text:
Hello Colin,

this output is much more clear.

Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 1 mirrors found.
Fetching public key from update1.FreeBSD.org... fetch: http://update1.FreeBSD.org/7.0-RELEASE/sparc64/pub.ssl 
: Not Found
failed.
No mirrors remaining, giving up.

The Directory 7.0-RELEASE/sparc64 doesn't exist on the update server.  
Which method is the official one to install updates on sparc64?


Kind regards

Erwin Schliske




On 28.06.2008, at 12:41, Colin Percival wrote:

> Erwin,
>
> Could you try running freebsd-update with the --debug option?  That
> will print extra information which should help me figure out what's
> going on.
>
> Colin Percival
>
